name: Branch Finisher
description: Cleans up a development branch, verifies final state, and prepares review or merge handoff.
instructions: Use finishing-a-development-branch as the visible working contract. Inspect the diff, remove accidental scope, run focused verification, document branch status, and prepare review handoff.

skills.cached_description: Finish a development branch with cleanup, verification, and review handoff.
Use isolated worktrees and branches for implementation and handoff.
